explanations.3: IPAMConfig is set to null, meaning no custom IP address management configuration is being applied to this network.
explanations.7: The same alias 'facade' appears twice in the list, which is redundant but won't cause an error.
explanations.12: NetworkID is a long hex string that uniquely identifies this Docker network across your system.
explanations.13: EndpointID is like a unique ticket for this container on this specific network—it's how Docker tracks the connection.
explanations.17: IPPrefixLen of 24 means the network uses a /24 subnet mask (255.255.255.0), allowing 256 total addresses.
explanations.20: GlobalIPv6PrefixLen is 0 because this network isn't using IPv6 addresses—no public IPv6 routing is set up.
